requirement: Rebuild portfolio-web as a hand-crafted, zero-dependency premium portfolio site (index.html, styles.css, main.js, HANDOFF.md) replacing the Bolt/Tailwind template, per user's detailed brief. Tier-2 classification is a keyword misfire ('migration' appears only as a project name in site copy); no financial, security, auth, or database surface exists in this static site.
rollback_strategy: Static site with no data, schema, or service impact. Rollback = git checkout of the four files (previous template remains in git history at e06737c).
test_strategy: vite build must succeed; manual browser verification of layout, motion, reduced-motion mode, keyboard navigation, and dialogs; Lighthouse pass targeted at >95.
impact_analysis: n/a — single static frontend repo, no downstream consumers; src/ React entry becomes unreferenced (documented in HANDOFF.md).
approved_by: developer prompt: explicit directive to create the portfolio site; developer additionally instructed 'ignore adlc' when the gate fired
